name: Egg Drop Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add bouillon cubes and stir until dissolved.
3. Stir in soy sauce; return to a boil.
4. Remove from heat, then add eggs all at once, stirring rapidly in one direction with a spoon.
5. Eggs will separate to form fine threads.
6. Stir in green onions.
7. Serve immediately.
